question: Will Vladimir Putin cease to be the president of the Russian Federation before 1 July 2025?
resolution_criteria: This question will be resolved using open-source news media reports.
background: In March 2024, Vladimir Putin was re-elected to serve a new six year term ( Reuters ). This comes after Putin signed into law in 2021 a change to the Russian constitution that reset his term limits, allowing him to run in 2024 and possibly 2030 ( CBS , AP News ). However, the full impact of the war in Ukraine, Russia’s economic problems, and domestic instability remains to be seen ( Atlantic Council , Wilson Center ).
